dataList.desc: 산군도 이 칼끝 아래 두동강나리 사용시
dataList.dlg: A single slash (一揮). None shall remain unsundered (必斷)!
I shall... set my form aright.

dataList.desc: 본국태세 - 곰 사냥으로 태세를 변경 했을 때
dataList.dlg: Mind and body as one (心身一如), I shall bear down upon them.

dataList.desc: 본국태세 - 범 사냥으로 태세를 변경했을 때
dataList.dlg: Silent in form, poised to act (靜中動). Opportunity lasts but for a single instant.

I, Im Gyeong-eop, Second Ordinant of the Salpippyeo Agroindustries, Official of the Sword, and Military Commissioner to the Royal Court, shall uphold the command...
... and sever the buds of rebellion before they propagate.
Set the pyeonjeon (片箭) upon the bowstring.

dataList.desc: 턴 시작 시 검계 우두머리 뫼르소가 있을 때 (전투당 1회)
dataList.dlg: Hah... Is he supposed to be me, too? Look at him, so self-serious... Must be after that day had come to pass.

dataList.desc: 육참 스킬에서 합 승리 후 공격 시

dataList.dlg: ... So the selfsame affair... repeats itself.
